title: Spicy Lemon Skewers
description: A flavorful and colorful dish perfect for a quick dinner, made with marinated skewers and a hint of spice.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Skewers (4-6)
ingredients.notes: Bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, mushrooms, zucchini

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and spice blend.
Add caramelized onions to the bowl and mix well.
Thread vegetables onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and grill for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush skewers with the lemon-spice mixture during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
